name: Bennion, Earl
description: Brother of great Bennion. Shines by reflected light.
text: Brother of great Bennion. Shines by reflected light.

name: Hayball, Nell
description: Expects to become rich.
text: Expects to become rich.

name: Carroll, Ernest
description: "He deserves praise who does not what he may, but what he ought."
text: "He deserves praise who does not what he may, but what he ought."

name: Cardon, Vince
description: He made a reputation and got it on his face, and that's about all that has really taken place. Figure-head in Student Life. Clownish in Dramatics. Hoodoo in Football. Simultaneous as quadratics.
text: He made a reputation and got it on his face, and that's about all that has really taken place. Figure-head in Student Life. Clownish in Dramatics. Hoodoo in Football. Simultaneous as quadratics.

name: Stratford, Ina
description: If Ina were declined but of course she never is—She would be declined something like this: Ein, Eine, Ein; or Won, Ina, Won.
text: If Ina were declined but of course she never is—She would be declined something like this: Ein, Eine, Ein; or Won, Ina, Won.

name: Pack, Daniel
description: Thinks masculine. Looks feminine. Acts neuter.
text: Thinks masculine. Looks feminine. Acts neuter.

name: Walters, Ed.
description: Has an E capacity but grinds out A's.
text: Has an E capacity but grinds out A's.

name: Mackay, Lizzie
description: Lizzie's eyes are always playing tricks on her religion.
text: Lizzie's eyes are always playing tricks on her religion.

name: Turpin, Geo.
motto: "Any low-browed brindle rooster, Can kerdoodle if he chooseter And cackle tra-la-la. But an incubator chicken, hatched By steam's a mighty chicken If he can recognize his ma."
description: Noble—these.
text:
"Any low-browed brindle rooster, Can kerdoodle if he chooseter And cackle tra-la-la. But an incubator chicken, hatched By steam's a mighty chicken If he can recognize his ma."
Noble—these.

name: Evans, Bob
description: A great problem for his wife, and a harmless flirt. Has high standing in the Ananias Club.
text: A great problem for his wife, and a harmless flirt. Has high standing in the Ananias Club.

name: Lee, Ethel
description: So wise but yet so easy. Ask the Juniors. No talent, but yet, a character.
text: So wise but yet so easy. Ask the Juniors. No talent, but yet, a character.

name: Horton, John P.
description: No talent, but yet, a character.
text: No talent, but yet, a character.

name: Jacobson, Julius
description: On their merits, modest men are dumb.
text: On their merits, modest men are dumb.

name: Anderson, Jessie
description: All the Profs love me.
text: All the Profs love me.

name: Adams, Hugh
description: When a fight begins within himself, a man's worth something.
text: When a fight begins within himself, a man's worth something.

name: Fonnesbeck, Leon
description: To succeed in the world we must be really wise.
text: To succeed in the world we must be really wise.

name: Eager, Lucy
description: Small and nifty, Good and thrifty, Bad points meager.
text: Small and nifty, Good and thrifty, Bad points meager.

name: Wallace, Cadmus
description: All my fame is due to myself alone.
text: All my fame is due to myself alone.

name: Hoff, E. P.
description: Neither blows from a pitchfork nor from the lash can make him change his ways.
text: Neither blows from a pitchfork nor from the lash can make him change his ways.

name: Homer, Mell
description: I attend to the business of others regardless of my own.
text: I attend to the business of others regardless of my own.

name: Flemming, Charles
description: Looks fierce but is perfectly harmless. Has Ruby eyes and long appendages.
text: Looks fierce but is perfectly harmless. Has Ruby eyes and long appendages.

name: Aldous, A. E.
motto: I swear it upon my hair.
description: Too late for herpicide.
text:
I swear it upon my hair.
Too late for herpicide.

name: Morrell, Marg.
description: D'ye think a woman's silence can be natural?
text: D'ye think a woman's silence can be natural?

name: Windsor, L. M.
description: Let us have silence while he speaks.
text: Let us have silence while he speaks.

name: Nibley, Anna
description: Good student, never studies, likes Fussy, uses good slang, is excellent "queener." Rest of our opinion we can't print.
text: Good student, never studies, likes Fussy, uses good slang, is excellent "queener." Rest of our opinion we can't print.

name: Lloyd, O. G.
description: Everything runs smoothly so long as everyone comes with him. Wise, serious, opinionative. A little wit, a little fun. Born to load the Buzzer gun.
text: Everything runs smoothly so long as everyone comes with him. Wise, serious, opinionative. A little wit, a little fun. Born to load the Buzzer gun.

name: West, Josephine
description: Remember, Miss West, you are too aristocratic for the rest of this bunch.
text: Remember, Miss West, you are too aristocratic for the rest of this bunch.

name: Jones, Roy
description: Sort of dudish, soldier air, Pudgy form, military hair, Basket-ball head, movement quick, Face round, shiny, slick.
text: Sort of dudish, soldier air, Pudgy form, military hair, Basket-ball head, movement quick, Face round, shiny, slick.

name: Peterson, W. L.
description: Owing to the resemblance, Mr. Peterson is the exclamation point used in the "Buzzer."
text: Owing to the resemblance, Mr. Peterson is the exclamation point used in the "Buzzer."

name: Bartlett, Helen
description: Balanced as a pair of scales. Leans to the weighty side. Carries her Rs as ballast, which she drops occasionally.
text: Balanced as a pair of scales. Leans to the weighty side. Carries her Rs as ballast, which she drops occasionally.

name: Wyatt, F. A.
description: Unable to express himself, his thoughts come by slow freight. Taking the glue treatment so that he can stick to his subject.
text: Unable to express himself, his thoughts come by slow freight. Taking the glue treatment so that he can stick to his subject.

name: Grue
description: Laugh at your friends and if your friends are sore, So much the better, you may laugh the more.
text: Laugh at your friends and if your friends are sore, So much the better, you may laugh the more.

name: McOmie
description: There is no use talking. I won't change my opinion.
text: There is no use talking. I won't change my opinion.

name: Wade, Nettie
description: Has a tongue, lithe and limber; Pretty green, but solid timber.
text: Has a tongue, lithe and limber; Pretty green, but solid timber.

name: Dixon, Veda
description: It is good to lengthen to the last a sunny mood; The "built in" smile that won't come off.
text: It is good to lengthen to the last a sunny mood; The "built in" smile that won't come off.

name: Stewart Brothers
description: Looks as if they "was" twins. One is better looking than the other. Which? Ask Miss Morell. Both born with a kink in the hair but one got it worse. A pair to draw to.
text: Looks as if they "was" twins. One is better looking than the other. Which? Ask Miss Morell. Both born with a kink in the hair but one got it worse. A pair to draw to.

name: Curtis, Ray B.
description: Very careful to whom he speaks. He learned the English language by listening, not talking.
text: Very careful to whom he speaks. He learned the English language by listening, not talking.

name: Ballantyne, A. B.
description: He, too deep for his hearers, still goes on refining, And thinks of convincing, while they think of dining.
text: He, too deep for his hearers, still goes on refining, And thinks of convincing, while they think of dining.

name: Bennion, Ethel
description: Extra good, nothing bad, Never cross, never sad, Just a little dear.
text: Extra good, nothing bad, Never cross, never sad, Just a little dear.

name: Barrows, H. P.
description: He is like a turtle in that he moves slowly; has a life of heaven, or vice versa, in that he is married; is like a savage in that he talks with his hands.
text: He is like a turtle in that he moves slowly; has a life of heaven, or vice versa, in that he is married; is like a savage in that he talks with his hands.

name: Lewis, Agness
description: Think all you speak, but speak not all you think.
text: Think all you speak, but speak not all you think.

name: Brothers, Stewart
description: Looks as if they "wuz" twins. One is better looking than the other. Which? Ask Miss Morrell. Both born with a kink in the hair but one got it worse. A pair to draw to.
text: Looks as if they "wuz" twins. One is better looking than the other. Which? Ask Miss Morrell. Both born with a kink in the hair but one got it worse. A pair to draw to.

name: Allred, R. C.
description: By Gosh! I was a great man when I was a freshman.
text: By Gosh! I was a great man when I was a freshman.

name: Peterson, Dean
description: Born according to rule. Acts on principle. Works by formula.
text: Born according to rule. Acts on principle. Works by formula.

name: Sadler, V. A.
description: This life isn't such a snap the older one gets.
text: This life isn't such a snap the older one gets.

name: Smith, Winnifred
description: Temperate in all things. 57
text: Temperate in all things. 57

name: Peterson, Erastus
description: Noted for being dry, witty, clever and very nice.
text: Noted for being dry, witty, clever and very nice.

name: Hurst, C. L.
description: Would make a good merchant—he always delivers the goods.
text: Would make a good merchant—he always delivers the goods.

name: Manning, Amelia
description: Sweet, gentle and serene.
text: Sweet, gentle and serene.

name: Kerr, Coral
description: A little nonsense now and then Is relished by the best of men.
text: A little nonsense now and then Is relished by the best of men.

name: Rasmussen, Aaron
description: A coming light in the commercial world. A walking balance sheet. Quick at figures, especially those of pretty stenographers.
text: A coming light in the commercial world. A walking balance sheet. Quick at figures, especially those of pretty stenographers.

name: Oldham, Wm. B.
description: The gentle sex is not for me.
text: The gentle sex is not for me.

name: Corlett, Riter
description: Great Reformer. Combatting the cigarette evil. Speaks from experience only. Attracts a great deal of attention, especially from the "Sops," owing to the loudness of his socks and his abbreviated trousers and shoes.
text: Great Reformer. Combatting the cigarette evil. Speaks from experience only. Attracts a great deal of attention, especially from the "Sops," owing to the loudness of his socks and his abbreviated trousers and shoes.

name: Perry, Susana
description: I often regret that I have spoken, never that I have been silent.
text: I often regret that I have spoken, never that I have been silent.

name: Perry, Abner
description: Youth still lingers in his face.
text: Youth still lingers in his face.

name: Parish, Clara
description: Her glossy hair was clustered o'er a brow bright with intelligence.
text: Her glossy hair was clustered o'er a brow bright with intelligence.

name: Pence, James D.
description: A good sport.
text: A good sport.
